atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness and tingling in the fingers and pain in the wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in his right wrist and hand for several months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain and numbness have been gradually increasing over time.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports weakness in his left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional tingling in his finger tips.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any prior diagnoses of rheumatoid arthritis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals bilateral Tinel's signs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with wrist and hand movement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination of the right hand reveals no abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is being evaluated for possible carpal tunnel syndrome.
